---
id: update-company-user
title: "Actualizar rol de un usuario de compañía"
description: "Reemplaza el rol actual por el rol indicado en `role_id`."
sidebar_label: "Actualizar rol de un usuario de compañía"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "patch api-method"
info_path: docs/api/resources/soyio-api
custom_edit_url: null
show_extensions: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Actualizar rol de un usuario de compañía"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/company_users/{token}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



<details>
<summary><strong>Permisos requeridos</strong></summary>

**Dashboard:** necesitas al menos uno de estos permisos.
- `users.dashboard.manage`

**API Keys:** necesitas al menos uno de estos permisos.
- `company_users.api.write`
- `company_users.api.manage`
- `company_users.api.manage`

</details>



Reemplaza el rol actual por el rol indicado en `role_id`.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"token","in":"path","required":true,"description":"Token del usuario de compañía","schema":{"type":"string"},"example":"cusr_1B2M2Y8AsgTpgAmY7PhCfg"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["company_user"],"properties":{"company_user":{"type":"object","required":["role_id"],"properties":{"role_id":{"type":"string","description":"Token del rol que reemplazará el rol actual del usuario.","example":"role_1B2M2Y8AsgTpgAmY7PhCfg"}},"title":"CompanyUserUpdateInput"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Usuario actualizado exitosamente","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"company_user":{"type":"object","x-tags":["Users"],"description":"Usuario de dashboard perteneciente a una compañía.","required":["id","email","name","created_at","updated_at","roles","permissions"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Token único del usuario de compañía.","example":"cusr_1B2M2Y8AsgTpgAmY7PhCfg"},"email":{"type":"string","format":"email","description":"Email del usuario de compañía.","example":"dashboard.user@example.com"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Nombre del usuario de compañía.","example":"Dashboard User"},"created_at":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Fecha y hora de creación del usuario.","example":"2024-03-20T15:30:00Z"},"updated_at":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Fecha y hora de última actualización del usuario.","example":"2024-03-20T15:30:00Z"},"roles":{"type":"array","description":"Roles actualmente asignados al usuario.","items":{"type":"object","description":"Rol asignado al usuario de compañía.","required":["id","name"],"properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Token del rol asignado.","example":"role_1B2M2Y8AsgTpgAmY7PhCfg"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Nombre del rol asignado.","example":"editor"}},"title":"CompanyUserRole"}},"permissions":{"type":"array","description":"Permisos efectivos del usuario, derivados de sus roles.","items":{"type":"string","description":"Permisos disponibles para usuarios de dashboard.","enum":["dashboard.read","dashboard.write","dashboard.manage","consent.dashboard.read","consent.dashboard.write","consent.dashboard.config","consent.dashboard.manage","dsr.dashboard.read","dsr.dashboard.write","dsr.dashboard.config","dsr.dashboard.manage","disclosure.dashboard.read","disclosure.dashboard.write","disclosure.dashboard.config","disclosure.dashboard.manage","users.dashboard.read","users.dashboard.manage","api_keys.dashboard.read","api_keys.dashboard.write","webhooks.dashboard.read","webhooks.dashboard.write","config.manage","data.dashboard.pii.read"],"title":"DashboardPermission"}}},"title":"CompanyUser"}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Error de parámetros inválidos","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"type":{"type":"string","example":"invalid_request_error"},"title":{"type":"string","example":"Invalid parameter"},"status":{"type":"integer","example":400},"detail":{"type":"string","example":"role_id is invalid"}}}}}},"401":{"description":"Error de autenticación","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["type","title","status","detail"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","example":"authentication_error"},"title":{"type":"string","example":"Unauthorized"},"status":{"type":"integer","example":401},"detail":{"type":"string","example":"We could not authenticate your credentials. Please check your request and try again"}},"title":"NotFoundErrorSchema"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
